seoTitle: Yelgun vs Yellow Dam — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yelgun and Yellow Dam. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Yelgun vs Yellow Dam: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yelgun and Yellow Dam.
heading: Yelgun vs Yellow Dam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yelgun, New South Wales and Yellow Dam, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yelgun has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Yellow Dam (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yelgun or Yellow Dam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yelgun has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Yellow Dam scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yelgun scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Yellow Dam scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yelgun or Yellow Dam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yelgun has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
